candidates.why: Separate operating line above EBIT, so it is not obviously embedded in the selected COGS row 'Cost of materials'. However, it is a combined depreciation+impairment row and is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales, so assigning it to COGS_DA would risk misclassification and double counting.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The only visible row is a mixed 'Depreciation and impairment' line, which is not clearly attributable to COGS and includes non-D&A content.

candidates.why: Separate operating line above EBIT and therefore not obviously embedded inside the selected XSGA component rows 'Payroll and social security expenses' and 'Other operating expenses'. But the row is not labelled as SG&A-specific and also includes impairment, so adding it to XSGA_DA would be uncertain and could overstate D&A.

variables.notes: Manually Added. No explicit SG&A-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The visible line is a combined 'Depreciation and impairment' expense without bucket attribution, so conservative treatment is to leave XSGA_DA empty pending manual review.
